title: Crispy Buffalo Chicken Wings

seo.title: Crispy Buffalo Chicken Wings Recipe - Easy & Best Ever!
seo.metaDescription: Get the secret to perfectly Crispy Buffalo Chicken Wings! This easy recipe guarantees a crunchy exterior and juicy interior, drenched in classic buffalo sauce. Perfect for game day!

seo.imageAlt: Plate of perfectly crispy buffalo chicken wings with celery sticks and blue cheese dipping sauce
seo.imageCaption: Achieve restaurant-quality Crispy Buffalo Chicken Wings at home with this foolproof recipe – perfect for your next gathering!

description: These Crispy Buffalo Chicken Wings are the ultimate game day snack, featuring a perfectly crunchy exterior and juicy interior that will impress any crowd. Each wing is generously coated in a classic tangy and spicy buffalo sauce, delivering an explosion of flavor with every bite. Serve them with cool blue cheese dressing and crisp celery for an unbeatable appetizer that will disappear fast.

ingredients.notes: flats and drumettes, patted very dry

instructions.title: Prepare the Chicken Wings
instructions.text: Preheat your oven to 400F (200C). Line a baking sheet with foil and place an oven-safe wire rack on top. Pat the chicken wings extremely dry with paper towels; this is crucial for crispiness. In a large bowl, toss the dried wings with baking powder, salt, and black pepper until evenly coated.

instructions.title: Arrange and Bake
instructions.text: Arrange the seasoned chicken wings in a single layer on the wire rack, ensuring there is space between each wing for even cooking and air circulation. Bake for 20 minutes.

instructions.title: Flip and Continue Baking
instructions.text: After 20 minutes, flip each wing to the other side. Continue baking for another 20-25 minutes, or until the wings are golden brown and incredibly crispy. The internal temperature should reach 165F (74C).

instructions.title: Prepare the Buffalo Sauce
instructions.text: While the wings are baking, prepare your buffalo sauce. In a medium saucepan over low heat, combine the Frank's RedHot Original Hot Sauce, melted unsalted butter, white vinegar, and garlic powder. Whisk until the sauce is smooth and heated through. Do not boil.

instructions.title: Toss Wings in Sauce
instructions.text: Once the wings are perfectly crispy, remove them from the oven. Transfer the hot wings to a large bowl. Pour the prepared buffalo sauce over the wings and toss gently until every wing is thoroughly coated.

instructions.title: Serve Immediately
instructions.text: Serve your Crispy Buffalo Chicken Wings immediately with your favorite blue cheese or ranch dressing, and a side of celery and carrot sticks for a classic American appetizer experience.

tips: For ultimate crispiness, pat the wings extremely dry before seasoning. The baking powder helps absorb moisture, creating a crunchy skin without deep frying.
Adjust the heat of your buffalo sauce by adding more or less hot sauce, or by incorporating a pinch of cayenne pepper for an extra kick.
Always serve buffalo wings fresh and hot. Reheat leftovers in an air fryer or oven to regain crispiness, avoiding the microwave which can make them soggy.
article: Crispy Buffalo Chicken Wings is a beloved American Appetizers dish enjoyed across American. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
